channel.title: Mfa on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Mfa on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Azure mandatory multifactor authentication: Phase 2 starting in October 2025
item.description:
Microsoft Azure will begin enforcing mandatory multi-factor authentication at the Azure Resource Manager layer starting October 1, 2025, per a post on the Microsoft Security Blog.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
